content:
(Apologies if there's been discussion of this in the past; I searched briefly but didn't find anything.)

It may be worth updating the default streams to minimally include #announcements and #introductions. Having just joined, I was a little surprised that I wasn't subscribed by default, and I worry that even that small barrier might be too much for some joining who have never used Zulip before.
good point! I just added them to default streams :thumbs_up:
Anton has marked this topic as resolved.
